enhanced_description:
The North Face Pullover Hoodie — Light Grey
Brand: The North Face
Size: S/P
Condition: Good
Composition: 100% Cotton
Color: Light Grey

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 50cm
Length: 70cm

About the Piece
Upgrade your loungewear game with this classic The North Face pullover hoodie. Crafted from soft, breathable cotton, it offers a comfortable fit perfect for chilly days or cozy nights in. The light grey colorway provides a versatile neutral that pairs effortlessly with any wardrobe.

Style Note: Minimalist Streetwear / Cozy Essentials

Key Detail
Features the iconic white embroidered logo on the chest and includes a fleece-lined interior for extra warmth. Please note there is a small hole or snag near the shoulder seam, which has been noted in the condition details.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more The North Face items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
